summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tebbi Medical Clinic Management System (iteration 2). Backend APIs are 100% functional (18/18 tests passed). Frontend UI is mostly functional with patient detail features working correctly. Minor issue with new patient form submission.

ui_bugs.issue: New patient form submission fails with 422 error. The form sends data but the state mapping may be incorrect for the Name (EN) field

integration_issues.issue: AI analysis dialog shows loading spinner continuously - may timeout or have slow response. API endpoint works (tested in backend tests) but UI might not handle long response times well

passed_tests: Frontend: Click on patient to view details
Frontend: Add new allergy (UITest_Aspirin added successfully)
Frontend: Add new diagnosis (UITest_Diabetes Type 2 added successfully)
Frontend: Add new medication (UITest_Metformin added successfully)
Frontend: AI Analysis button triggers analysis dialog
Frontend: Arabic RTL layout working correctly
action_items: Fix new patient form submission - check form state mapping in PatientsPage.js line 24-28 and handleSubmit function. The name field might not be correctly bound
Consider adding timeout/error handling for AI analysis dialog when response takes too long
critical_code_review_comments: PatientsPage.js has eslint warning for missing useEffect dependency 'fetchPatients'
PatientDetailPage.js has eslint warning for missing useEffect dependency 'fetchData'
Multiple pages have similar useEffect dependency warnings - consider using useCallback for fetch functions
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from previous iteration. Created test allergies, diagnoses, and medications during UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs are fully functional. Patient detail page (allergies, diagnoses, medications tabs) work correctly. New patient creation from UI has validation issue. AI analysis triggers but may have long response times. All data-testid selectors are properly set.

new_patient_form_failure.symptom: New patient form submission returns 422 Unprocessable Entity
new_patient_form_failure.root_cause: Form state formData is initialized with empty strings including name:''. When form is submitted, the input value might not be properly updating the state due to selector issue in the grid layout
new_patient_form_failure.suggested_fix: Verify the input's onChange handler is correctly updating formData.name. The issue might be related to how inputs are indexed in the grid layout. Consider adding data-testid or name attributes to inputs for reliable selection.
